title: Daewoo Samurai VertiBlend 500W Personal Blender, Smoothie & Shake Maker, 2 x 600ml Bottles, On-the-Go Blender for Fruit, Veg, Protein & Ice, Compact Design
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 500W High-Speed Blending Power – Crush fruit, veg, ice and more in seconds to create silky smoothies and powerful shakes in seconds, with robust stainless-steel blades and high-speed motor

Dual 600ml Bottles with Flip Lids – Comes with two 600ml drinking bottles and secure flip-top lids for easy grab-and-go convenience, perfect for busy mornings, post-workout shakes, or lunchbox-ready blends
Simple Twist & Blend Functionality – Blend directly in the bottle, then swap the blade for the lid, no extra jugs, no extra washing up or mess
Compact Design for Daily Use – Slim, space-saving body fits in any kitchen, ideal for homes, student flats, or office setups

Safe, Easy & Effortless Cleaning – Rinse bottles and blades under warm water after each use. No dishwashers needed, fast, safe, and ready for daily use. With a built-in safety lock to prevent mis operation
description: From the manufacturer Product Details Features What's in the Box

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎500W motor, stainless-steel blades, 2 x 600ml bottles, flip-top lids, twist-to-blend design, vertical storage, pulse function, speed control dial, compact base, anti-slip feet, safety lock system, hand-washable parts, smoothie maker, ice crushing, suitable for shakes, sauces, batters
